sentences.translation: Porodica je otišla u veliki supermarket.
sentences.translationEn: The family went to the big supermarket.

sentences.arabic: أَخَذُوا عَرَبَةَ التَّسَوُّقِ وَجَالُوا بَيْنَ الأَقْسَامِ.
sentences.translation: Uzeli su kolica za kupovinu i hodali između odjela.
sentences.translationEn: They took a shopping cart and walked between the sections.

sentences.translation: Stavili su u kolica ono što im treba.
sentences.translationEn: They put in the cart what they needed.

sentences.arabic: عِنْدَ الصُّنْدُوقِ حَسَبَ الصُّنْدُوقِيُّ المَبْلَغَ الكُلِّيَّ.
sentences.translation: Na kasi je kasir izračunao ukupni iznos.
sentences.translationEn: At the checkout the cashier calculated the total amount.
